document_id: Economic Incentives Report for the Credit for Constructing Renewable Fuel Facilities (Article 3B ‚Äì Business and Energy Credits) For Returns Processed during Calendar Year 2024.pdf

findings.description: Main title formatting is more prominent and wrapped differently in the HTML, altering the visual hierarchy slightly.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the title is smaller and compact across fewer lines; in the HTML, it is significantly larger, bolder, and spans more lines, making it visually more dominant than in the source.

findings.description: Notes list formatting differs, with looser spacing/indentation in HTML.
findings.evidence: The PDF shows a compact numbered notes list with tighter line spacing and wrapped text aligned under each number; the HTML renders the notes with more spacing and slightly different indentation, though still as a numbered list.
